gist.headline: Spinning new webs
gist.blurb: The community just shipped wwwsim, a new dev tool that lets you spin up entire websites using models like Gemini and Claude. Building the web just got a whole lot cozier.
gist.summary: Added wwwsim, a new community-built AI website creator, to the Dev Tools showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use wwwsim to generate website designs, layouts, and code using multiple top-tier AI models.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot collaborating on building a tiny website. The robot displays a wireframe on its screen, and Polly holds a tiny blueprint. Represents web development and AI collaboration.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot building a tiny glowing website structure together. The robot's screen displays a colorful wireframe layout, while the bee holds a tiny pixelated blueprint. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
